description: Remove the likes functionality from both the backend API and frontend UI, including the endpoint, service method, data property, and all related UI components

tasks.task:
Remove likes feature from the NestJS backend:
1. In src/blog/blog.service.ts:
   - Remove 'likes: number' property from the Post interface (line 8)
   - Remove 'likes: 0' from all sample post data (lines 19, 26, 33)
   - Remove 'likes: 0' from the create() method's new post object (line 56)
   - Delete the entire likePost() method (lines 62-69)
2. In src/blog/blog.controller.ts:
   - Remove the @Post(':id/like') endpoint and likePost() method (lines 36-39)

Remove likes feature from the React frontend:
1. In src/components/PostList.tsx:
   - Remove 'likes: number' from the Post interface (line 8)
2. In src/components/PostDetail.tsx:
   - Remove 'onPostLiked' from PostDetailProps interface (line 9)
   - Remove 'onPostLiked' from destructured props (line 12)
   - Remove 'isLiking' state declaration (line 15)
   - Delete the entire handleLike async function (lines 36-53)
   - Remove the like-section div containing the like button (lines 64-72)
3. In src/App.tsx:
   - Delete the handlePostLiked function (lines 45-48)
   - Remove 'onPostLiked={handlePostLiked}' prop from PostDetail component (line 73)

example_backend: Verify GET /posts returns posts without likes property
Verify GET /posts/:id returns a post without likes property
Verify POST /posts creates a post without likes property
Verify POST /posts/:id/like endpoint no longer exists (should return 404)
example_frontend: Verify PostList renders posts without errors
Verify PostDetail displays post without like button
Verify creating a new post works without likes field
Verify editing and deleting posts still work correctly
Verify no console errors related to missing likes property
